# KidSalonia

> KidSalonia is Gurugram's premium kids salon offering gentle haircuts, playful nail art, kids party makeup, and safe skin care for children of all ages.

KidSalonia is a dedicated kids salon located at JMD Suburbio 2, Gurugram, Haryana. We specialize in child-friendly grooming experiences using dermatologically tested, paraben-free, and hypoallergenic products. Services include kids haircuts, mundan ceremonies, nail art and extensions, jelly manicures and pedicures, kids party makeup, and lice treatment. Open Monday and Wednesday–Friday, 11:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday–Sunday, 10:30 AM to 9:00 PM (closed Tuesdays).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Premium kids salon in Gurugram — services, highlights, and booking.
- [About Us](/about-us): Our story, philosophy, and commitment to child-safe grooming.
- [Hair Services](/hair): Kids haircuts, styling, mundan ceremonies, and pricing.
- [Nail Services](/nails): Kids nail art, extensions, and jelly manicures/pedicures.
- [Skin Services](/skin): Kids party makeup and gentle skin care.
- [Contact Us](/contact-us): Booking, location, hours, and contact details.
- [Insights](/insights): Kids care blog with grooming tips and parenting advice.
